programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a vice admiral's laptop is infected with ransomware, he enlists McGee and the NCIS team to track down the hacker before the computer virus eliminates his personal and professional files. Bruce Boxleitner guest stars

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Double bill. When the body of a former agent washes ashore in New Orleans, Gibbs believes the murder could be linked to a case the victim had previously worked on. DiNozzo, McGee and the FBI continue to track political connections to the case of the murder of a former agent, while Bishop sends DiNozzo a souvenir

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell explores the history of the design and construction of the Tyne Bridge, which links Newcastle and Gateshead, discovering many believe that it was the inspiration for the Sydney Harbour Bridge. He also finds out why the bridge is so revered by Geordies, not just as a way to cross the river, but because it was built to keep shipbuilders employed and their skills alive during the dark days of the 1920s recession

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Three Faces West (1940)
programme.desc: An Austrian doctor and his daughter arrive in the dust bowl regions of America after fleeing the Nazis, and join the exodus of farmers seeking fertile land in Oregon. The daughter falls for the pioneer leading the journey, despite being engaged to the man who helped her escape the Third Reich. Drama, starring John Wayne, Charles Coburn and Sigrid Gurie

programme.title: Blanche Fury (1948)
programme.desc: A penniless governess is invited to stay with a wealthy relative, where she hopes to secure her future and take over the estate by marrying her infatuated cousin. However, her secret romance with a stablehand has tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Valerie Hobson, Michael Gough, Stewart Granger and Walter Fitzgerald

programme.title: Thunder Over Arizona (1956)
programme.desc: An honest cowboy is mistaken for the notorious outlaw he killed in self-defence. Before he can clear up the misunderstanding, he is approached by a corrupt mayor who draws him into a conspiracy to wrest control of a silver mine from its rightful owners. Western, starring Skip Homeier, Kristine Miller, George Macready and Wallace Ford

programme.title: El Dorado (1966)
programme.desc: An ageing gunfighter is drawn into the conflict between a land-grabbing cattle baron and a ranching family, but gets wounded in the process. A year later, he returns to town to find the situation has not improved - so along with his sidekick and the drunken town sheriff, he fights to defend the family from its enemies. Western, starring John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, James Caan and Ed Asner

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: Last Action Hero (1993)
programme.desc: A boy watching an action movie is transported into the film by a magic ticket and meets its hero figure, who refuses to believe he is a fictional character. Matters take a turn for the worse when the screen villain gets hold of the ticket and crosses over into the real world - where bad guys can win. Comedy adventure, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Austin O'Brien, Charles Dance, F Murray Abraham and Anthony Quinn

programme.title: True Lies (1994)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary computer salesman leads a double life as a secret agent battling international terrorism. His naive wife is unaware of his dual employment, and goes in search of adventure - only to end up in the clutches of terrorists who have stolen a nuclear weapon. James Cameron's action comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jamie Lee Curtis and Tom Arnold

programme.title: In Fear (2013)
programme.desc: A couple go to Ireland for a music festival, but get hopelessly lost when driving through a series of country roads. Their plight turns deadly as they are terrorised by mysterious figures lurking in the darkness, while an encounter with a seemingly harmless local brings dangers of its own. Horror, starring Iain De Caestecker, Alice Englert and Allen Leech

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs (2009)
programme.desc: An orphaned brother and sister face losing their beloved dog when they go into a foster home that does not allow pets. The kids find the ideal hiding place in an abandoned hotel, and set about transforming it into luxury canine accommodation for not just their beloved pet, but every stray in town. Family comedy, starring Emma Roberts, Jake T Austin, Don Cheadle and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig

programme.title: Dragonheart (1996)
programme.desc: A knight sets out to slay a dragon, only to find the unhappy creature is the last of its kind. Forging an unlikely alliance, the pair embark on a mission to rid their kingdom of its tyrannical ruler. Fantasy adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite and Julie Christie, with the voice of Sean Connery

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)
programme.desc: Fearless hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a host of other characters from Victorian literature - including Captain Nemo, the Invisible Man, Tom Sawyer and Dr Jekyll - to put a stop to the nefarious Fantom's evil plot to bring about a world war. Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery in his final screen role, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)
programme.desc: A soldier fighting in a post-apocalyptic war against living machines is sent back in time to prevent an attempt to change the past - but when he arrives, he finds that history has been changed beyond recognition - and that a plot is being hatched by an unexpected enemy to destroy the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Ray's jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: The Other Side of the Door (2016)
programme.desc: A grieving mother living in India learns of a temple that contains a mysterious portal, through which she would be able to speak to her dead son one last time. She disobeys instructions not to open the portal fully, and disrupts the balance between life and death as the boy's dangerous spirit is unleashed into the world - and worse besides. Horror, starring Sarah Wayne Callies and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: The strand returns with a collection of new films from black film-makers, beginning with Anne Fearon's Motherhood

programme.title: Mother's Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, an array of seemingly unconnected characters all find themselves reconsidering their relationships with their mothers and what motherhood mean to them. Garry Marshall's ensemble comedy in which various families go through dramatic turning points, starring Julia Roberts, Jennifer Aniston, Kate Hudson, Jason Sudeikis, Jennifer Garner and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Time Bandits (1981)
programme.desc: A bemused schoolboy is escorted on a bizarre journey through time by a group of larcenous dwarfs. His adventures lead him to encounters with various characters from history - but none of them are quite what he had imagined. Terry Gilliam's fantasy comedy, starring Craig Warnock, David Rappaport, John Cleese, Michael Palin, Sean Connery, Ian Holm, Ralph Richardson and David Warner

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King (1975)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in 19th-century India travel to an unexplored land, where one of them fools the natives into believing he is a god. However, his growing delusions of grandeur put him at loggerheads with his comrade-in-arms. Adventure based on the Rudyard Kipling story, directed by John Huston, starring Sean Connery, Michael Caine, Saeed Jaffrey, Christopher Plummer and Shakira Caine

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace

programme.title: Escape Plan (2013)
programme.desc: An expert takes a contract from the CIA to test a maximum security prison by trying to break out of it, but he soon discovers he has been duped and that his captors intend him to stay inside for ever. He hatches a plan to escape, but to succeed he will need the help of a long-term convict - who wants his own freedom in return for assistance. Thriller, with Sylvester Stallone and Arnold Schwarzenegger

programme.title: Plastic (2014)
programme.desc: A gang of credit card thieves accidentally steals from a gangster, who demands to be paid back 10 times over. The leader of the group comes up with a plan to carry out a daring jewellery heist in Miami, but his scheme is undermined as his team begin to turn on each other. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Ed Speleers, Will Poulter and Alfie Allen

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: Vacant Base by Isaac Tomiczek, exploring the influence of clubbing on modern British multiculturalism

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sushi Ko, a Japanese restaurant in California that is losing up to $20,000 a month. Gordon finds owner and chef Akira lacking in confidence and self-esteem as the strain of an empty business is beginning to take its toll on his relationship with this family

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina begins to suffer with flu symptoms, she finds all the magic has been zapped out of her pointing finger. As a result, her aunts force her to stay home from school

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Harvey finds himself whisked away to the top of a giant beanstalk, where he's fattened up by a wicked witch intent on making him her gourmet meal of the week. Fortunately, Salem is on hand to attempt a daring rescue. Shelley Long guest stars

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to woo Ted with his womanising tactics when he declines his offer to design the new GNB building, while Robin drunkenly calls Don in a desperate effort to win him back. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The pals race to a restaurant where Woody Allen has just been spotted, with each of them deciding to use a different mode of transport. However, as the contest to get there first begins, it becomes clear they all have very personal reasons for wanting to win. With a guest appearance by US talk show host Maury Povich

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya is obliged to do jury service, which feels like a holiday for her until she learns that Taylor's mother Melanie will be there at the same time. After having a few bad experiences, JJ is less than truthful in his profile on an online dating site. Meanwhile, Ray becomes upset about the fact that Jimmy and Dylan spend so much time together

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ is thrilled when he is chosen by his classmates to film his horror movie project, but soon the pressure of directing becomes too much for him. When Jimmy makes some suggestions about their neighbour's house construction programme, it backfires badly for the DiMeos. Meanwhile, Dylan's class assignment reveals a family secret

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny worries about the consequences of spending the night with Raj, and Leonard's reaction confirms her worst fears. Meanwhile, Sheldon is more interested in the upcoming paintball competition, and tries to refocus the boys' attentions as they argue over the previous evening's activities. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With Dave Kim's parents out of town for the weekend, Adam decides to throw a giant party to impress Brea. Beverly lets fame go to her head after her cookbook is published

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when William Penn institutes a new open lunch policy, but Beverly has other plans. Geoff gets more than he bargained for when he uses Barry's student ID

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Gina attend their 20th anniversary high-school reunion. Back at the precinct, Boyle helps Diaz with a decision about her love life. Meanwhile, Holt, Jeffords, Hitchcock and Scully attempt to identify the mystery sound in a radio show competition

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Gina spends time with each member of the squad, playing a high-stakes game of chess with Captain Holt, going out for a fancy lunch with Diaz and Santiago, infiltrating an expensive social club with Peralta and finding special gifts for the team

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette download a dating app onto Amy's phone in order to find her a new boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD swallows his pride and asks Elliot for help to train his incompetent interns, while Dr Cox finds he cannot treat his baby son himself, and sets out in search of the perfect paediatrician for the job. Comedy, starring Zach Braff, John C McGinley and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD realises he either has to accept Elliot's relationship with Sean and move on, or tell her how he feels. Dr Cox is forced to seek help in his bid to become the new residency director, and Turk is annoyed to find himself sharing a shift with Carla, who embarrasses him in front of the other surgeons

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: A Christmas tree fire leads Maya to tell a small lie that has some big consequences. Meanwhile, Ray struggles to live in Pepper's shadow as Dylan twists the knife, and JJ encourages Kenneth to stand up to his sisters. Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler star

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya lends a helping hand to her frenemy Melanie and finds her life taking a surprising turn. Dylan joins the Lafayette High School basketball team, where her lousy sportsmanship gets results. Meanwhile, Jimmy makes up for lost father-son time with Ray

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt and Peralta investigate when three valuable antique coins are stolen from the university where Kevin works as a lecturer. Meanwhile, back at the precinct, Jeffords and Santiago get competitive about taking the squad out for lunch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out about Bernadette's big news, they celebrate by getting together for an evening of karaoke. However, Bernadette is upset when Howard freaks out over her announcement as he becomes convinced that he needs to start earning more money. Comedy, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with guest appearances from Adam West, Wil Wheaton and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode of the soap from 2009. Theresa, Newt, Anita and Lauren break into Hollyoaks High at night and try to take a sneak peek at their GCSE results

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: CB hopes getting Lainey a Beanie Baby for Christmas will show his true feelings for her. Meanwhile, Principal Glascott tries to convince Felicia to participate in a play

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies dishes out the absurd A-list challenges once more. Aisling Bea, Bob Mortimer, Mark Watson, Nish Kumar and Sally Phillips are driven to ever more absurd lengths in the battle to lay their sticky fingers on Taskmaster Greg's golden head

programme.title: The Boss (2016)
programme.desc: A successful entrepreneur is imprisoned for insider trading, losing everything in the process. After her sentence, she sets out to launch a comeback and win back the respect of the nation - but with no one else to turn to, she finds herself a reluctant houseguest of her long-suffering former assistant. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Bell and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon agrees to participate in a series of short lectures at the university, but is worried the students dislike him. Following Amy's advice, he asks Penny to give him acting lessons to help him engage with his audience. Elsewhere, Raj fantasises about his best friend's partner. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Beth and Rick visit Froopyland, an 'imaginary world' that Rick created for Beth during her childhood, to find and rescue Beth's friend Tommy, who was trapped there years earlier. Jerry starts dating an alien warrior priestess called Keara

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Having previously lost his hand during an encounter with Angel, Lindsey is delighted when his bosses at Wolfram & Hart grant him a new one. However, when the appendage turns out to have an evil mind of its own, the team steps in to investigate where it came from. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Daters include 31-year-old Adam, who believes his voice - which has been compared to David Beckham's - puts off potential girlfriends. Eighty-year-old glamorous great-grandma Lynda has been single for three years and is looking for someone to share a good time with, while 27-year-old salon manager Stephanie worries that her excessive sweating could be a turn-off

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost gives advice to the Dane and Nicole Ostler, who are struggling to control their two rambunctious boys while also still grieving the loss of their first child

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Anna has always dreamed of getting married in the family church in Norfolk, but her fiance Lee decides to plan a Vegas-themed wedding

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead, goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Lee and his friends

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Liv and Tristan hit a major stumbling block when they return to Chelsea, while Verity arranges for Charlie to meet her mother, and Sam finds out if he can make amends with Tiff

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides he's only suitable for 'nerd' roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Erica's life

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry plans big romantic gestures for Lainey on high school prom night, while Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together, but things don't go as planned. Adam is thrilled when a nerdy but cute girl asks him out, but is horrified when Beverly gets involved

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret from Howard's past comes to light as he tries to win back Bernadette, while Sheldon and Raj engage in a battle of wills when they have to work in the same office. Guest starring Katee Sackhoff and George Takei

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friend's secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howard's suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldon's old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howard's girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: With his parents recently divorced, privately educated Will has to move to a new area and make friends at the local comprehensive, where he meets Simon, Jay and Neil. First episode of the comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neil's father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The competing comics demonstrate their love of watermelon and Johnny tries to win points by grabbing a passing cyclist and introducing him to some Christmas-related equipment. Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan, Richard Herring and Johnny Vegas take part in another round of ludicrous challenges judged by Greg Davies, with Alex Horne keeping score

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share more of their insightful critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including The Great British Bake Off, The World According to Vladimir Putin, Take Me Out, Seven Worlds, One Planet, This Morning and movie The Revenant. Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in November 2019

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-titled alpha male Josh struts in brimming with confidence, keen to find his very own Kardashian. Will glamorous 25-year-old Yasmin match his high standards? After years out of the dating game, waxing entrepreneur Sherie has decided now is the time to find a man. She is paired with fellow northerner Richard - but his dating anecdotes could backfire. Others hoping to make an impression are Disney-loving Jamie, musician Zander and Shannon, who says she is a 'weirdo - in a good way'

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A musician looking for someone who appreciates his singing is not afraid to put on a show for the whole restaurant during a date with a criminology student who is fascinated with serial killers - a passion that has left her wary of meeting strangers for fear of being murdered. Two people bond over their shared Italian heritage, but find they may be too different to work as a couple. Two care workers, one of whom makes his own suits, go on a blind date, but soon discover that this is not their first encounter

Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan

Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Andy Serkis, Jason Clarke and Gary Oldman

programme.desc: London market trader Dave hopes he can win over his date with some good old-fashioned banter - so when he is paired with Sara, who wants to meet a 'proper East End geezer', they hit it off straight away. But how will he react when she reveals her marriage lasted only five days? Dennis and Chris suspect they might have found the one when they spot that they are wearing matching trainers, while hospice worker Cora sits down with avid dancer Neil - but when she reveals she hates technology, he wonders if they are on the same wavelength

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. The McQueens' blackmailer summons the family for an urgent announcement, and Juliet attempts to throw Jordan of the scent of who betrayed him

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp creates some quick and easy 1960s-style pop art with a spray can to help transform Amber and Colin's living room

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Karl and Naomh, who first met at university, love the relaxed lifestyle of Menorca and want to be near the beautiful beaches of its south-east coast where they held their wedding. With Scarlette Douglas on hand and a top cash budget of £230,000, they are looking for a place with plenty of outside space for themselves and their two dogs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien converts a lantern into a stylish table and Henry Cole changes a fire extinguisher into a steampunk lamp as the pair visit a private railway

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo restores a pair of designer chairs, while Henry Cole breathes new life into a decrepit garden table, transforming it into a colourful and valuable new one

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge helps Donna McDougal, who believes a horde of ancient armour was hidden in her chateau's lake. New parents in the Dordogne juggle the responsibility of looking after their baby with converting an attic into a bed-and-breakfast suite, and Limoges chateau owners Colette and Paul launch an ambitious new menu

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to north Devon to help seafaring retirees Brian and Fiona build a home befitting its stunning coastal plot. The couple are on site almost every day to ensure they keep to their ambitious six-month deadline. Can Charlie convince them to go with his suggestions, or will Brian's determination to skipper the build his way win the day?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brigitte Tee, who runs four-star B&B Gorse Meadow in the New Forest, hosts the first round of the competition. Her guests are initially charmed by her eccentric personality, but the discovery of a bathroom window in need of repair and another room containing ladybirds, cobwebs and dust soon takes the shine off their stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to Lynton in north Devon, where they stay at Alistair and Emma Mundell's four-star Castle Hill Guesthouse. The pair only opened the B&B three months prior to the competition, and hope to impress with their recently renovated rooms, but Brigitte Tee proves hard to win over. Two of their guests are also forced to overcome their fears during a trip on a Victorian cliff railway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves north to Blackpool and the three-star Vidella B&B run by John Downer and Neil Williams. The pair rig Blackpool-hater Alistair Mundell's room with practical jokes, and take their guests to Funny Girls drag cabaret bar, where Mark Crib confesses he has never had such a surreal time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Crib welcomes the group to the Urban Beach in Bournemouth, Dorset, for the week's final B&B visit. The boutique establishment features chic rooms with deluxe bathrooms, and the guests approve of the afternoon's activity - a speedboat ride along the Jurassic coast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Brigitte Tee is upset to discover she has been given only one point for cleanliness and a heated exchange results in a walk-out, before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's penguins move into a temporary home while a new luxury home is built for them, but the move becomes upsetting when malaria sweeps the colony, with elder Rudd battling to survive against the odds. Meanwhile, the African painted dog pups venture out of their den for the first time, but the runt of the litter Mosi refuses to go out into the cold, and keepers worry she may have issues with her eyesight. Elsewhere, Sumatran orangutan Emma gives birth, and a beetle with a wonky horn has to fight other bachelors in the group to win the attention of a female.

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Donna McDougal's search for the armour in the lake continues. Tim and Krys, with the help of Tim's brother Ben, continue in their struggle to get the attic converted in time for the first guests of the season. Dick and his mother-in-law Jenny struggle with preparing and freezing 227kg of pork, before attempting to turn the final 2kg into salamis

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows two more plots on the epic five-year self-build in Oxfordshire. Twenty-five-year-olds Chris and Roxie take a risk building their first home together using an untested flatpack construction system. Meanwhile, Peter and Anita and their two teenagers have outgrown their current house and are keen to upsize. Father and son hope to bond while building a family home with space for all - but the process is not all plain sailing

programme.title: The Same Sky
programme.desc: Lars proves every bit as successful with Sabine as he was with Lauren, even though Sabine's father Howard watches her every move. However, Lars is caught by his own strong feelings for her. Juliane fears for Klara, and Gita promises to take her to a doctor. Axel takes a chance and approaches the diggers. Detective thriller, starring Tom Schilling, Sofia Helin and Friederike Becht. In German and English

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras focus on the ups and downs of family life and how people pull together to get through them. Among the patients is Pam, 53, who is admitted to A&E after suffering a suspected heart attack. There's also a profile of 10-year-old Cora, who is rushed to St George's after being thrown from a horse into the branches of a tree

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Staff and patients at St George's in south west London talk about the importance of family support when dealing with difficult circumstances. Fifty-one-year-old painter and decorator Gary is rushed to St George's after falling 10 feet from a ladder. Cameras also follow five-year-old Beatriz, who has symptoms of a fever. She has a rare kidney condition that affects her immune system, making her vulnerable to infection

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Beachfront Inn and Inlet, a Caribbean-style resort hotel in Fort Pierce, Florida. Young and inexperienced owner Brian is making guests' time at the hotel miserable with dusty rooms, late-night concerts and poor service. Can Gordon prevent the business from going under?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations. Kate Quilton learns how a special enzyme contained in pineapples attacks and destroys dead skin cells in the mouth, with scientists using this enzyme to treat the victims of burns. Jimmy Doherty investigates the catastrophic effects of not getting enough vitamin D when he meets a boy who has rickets, while Matt Tebbutt finds out how a Lincolnshire business produces 1.5 million bottles of elderflower cordial without employing a single flower-picker

programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations. Jimmy Doherty visits Thailand to find out if the alarming headlines about additive MSG are justified, Kate Quilton heads to California to find out why there are so many closed pistachios in the packs on supermarket shelves, and Matt Tebbutt learns why slicing onions makes people cry with help from an innovative farmer and a team of cage fighters

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin is on the Canary Island of Tenerife helping husband and wife Teresa and Robin find their dream holiday home that they hope to retire to in the future. Having visited the island six times in the last few years, it's quickly become their favourite place. With five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, will they find what they're looking for?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Bev have been married for a decade and now wish to realise their dream of relocating to Torrevieja, Spain. With a maximum budget of £100,000 and a long list of family and friends ready to come out and visit, this extremely sociable pair want a property with enough space for guests as well as a music room for musician Paul. Jean Johansson sets out to help find them an appropriate property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Paul and Clare search for a holiday home in central Portugal that has the potential to double up as a biker's retreat, all on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters looking for homes in the historic city of York. Kirstie helps first-time buyers Tom and Timna, who met at university, married soon after and are now expecting their first child. With the lease on their rental almost up, time is of the essence find them their family home. Phil is searching for Yorkshire-born Rich and Kirsty, who have been living it up in London but want to move back up North to be closer to their family - and to start their own

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: In 2010, architectural designer Lincoln Miles and artist Lisa Traxler found an uninspiring 1970s bungalow on a plot on the Isle of Wight surrounded by ancient woodland. As part of their renovation project, they added a three-storey 'tower' extension and used a range of unconventional techniques and alternative materials. Two years later, Kevin McCloud returned to find out whether the couple's methods led to success

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vicki Fairbrother hosts the first party in East Lancashire, hoping her steak main and banoffee pie dessert will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize. However, she must contend with self-confessed snob Chelsea Symcox, perfectionist Chris Slater, entrepreneur Jenna Tattersall and hairdresser Nigel Womack if she is to walk away with the cash at the end of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businesswoman Jenna Tattersall hosts the second dinner party in East Lancashire, but an unimpressed Chelsea Symcox suspects the stuffed courgette starter is intended to send a message to the guests. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Slater tries to add some class to proceedings as he hosts the third dinner party in East Lancashire, but his habit of chewing with his mouth open disgusts his guests. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Adrian crashed his bike into a car and may have a serious chest injury requiring emergency surgery, so he makes a heartfelt phone call to his wife Lili - who is 1,400 miles away in Montenegro. Meanwhile, Steve, 49, was encouraged to go to A&E by his wife Julia when his heart rate more than doubled in an hour while preparing supper, and doctors try to determine whether his accelerated heart is connected to his recent stroke and whether he is at risk of having another

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors treat a young woman who has been thrown from a horse, which then trampled on her, and also a woman who was hit by a car while riding her motorbike on a dual carriageway. An 11-year-old boy is brought into hospital after running into a wall at school and hurting his wrist

programme.title: Father Ted

Noel goes ahead with surgery on the complex fracture, but if there are any complications the kitten may face amputation

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The presenter continues his look back at some of the best builds over five series of Amazing Spaces. This time he turns his attention to some of the most innovative and eccentric caravan and campervan builds he's ever seen - from a tiny Italian tuk tuk campervan to a trailer tent caravan clad in old CDs, and a tiny 1950s ambulance converted to sleep a family of six, plus their dog. There is also an Airstream caravan converted into the ultimate party pad, and a look at George's own high-tech holiday home in the Lake District

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The presenter focuses his attention on how nature and architecture can work harmoniously together in terms of cabin accommodation. He considers a mountain-top ski lodge in Italy only accessible by helicopter, a hobbit-inspired cob house in Oxfordshire built for only £150, and a concrete dome-home built under a man-made hill in a Texan hurricane valley. George also reflects on his own wilderness cabin that he built in the Sussex woodlands

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect reflects on the incredible things it's possible to build in the humble back garden, from a cliff-top stargazing retreat to a glorious garden room made from a derelict swimming pool, and the country's most multi-functional shed. George also looks back on his own garden build, where he and Will Hardie transformed his dilapidated garage and unloved lawn into the ultimate garden family studio

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre-lover Claire Flatt hosts the first party in Ipswich, where one guest makes a big impression by arriving in a limousine. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Magician David J Marks hosts the third dinner party in Ipswich, and hopes to win over Kerrie Pankhurst after offending her the previous night. His salmon starter impresses all the diners except Dave James, who explains all the gruesome things he would rather do than eat the fish, so the host lightens the mood by showing off his ventriloquist dummies and laying on a magic show

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Dave James hosts the fourth dinner party from Ipswich and asks his guests to attend dressed as pop stars. Claire Flatt and Nicki Yucel are suspicious about his celebrity connections, and there is trouble when the diners discover Dave obtained help with the cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Speed-dating expert Nicki Yucel hosts the final dinner party in Ipswich, and is determined to cultivate a romantic atmosphere. As the evening progresses, Kerrie Pankhurst reveals her feelings for another diner, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Shoes in Durham, where landlord Billy Gowland and partner Debbie Nelson hope their footwear-themed pub and B&B is the right fit for their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Biggin Hall Hotel in Derbyshire, owner James Moffat and partner Annie Larner hope the B&Bers will fall for the rural charm of their 17th-century farmhouse

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and son Fiona and James Milligan welcome the guests to Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant in Bournemouth, where the ostentatious decor gets mixed reactions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Shoes is up first and hosts Billy Gowland and his partner Debbie Nelson find out if their budget rooms have proved too basic for the group. Next, James Moffat and his partner Annie Larner from Biggin Hall Hotel want to clear up their issues with Billy and Debbie. As the third hosts, Charles and Lisa Hooper from yurt glamp-site Forest Garden Shovelstrode confront their low scores from James. Finally, Fiona and James from the Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant make accusations of nitpicking and double standards

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, the 34-year-old faces competition from estate agent Alexandra Austin, beautician Emma Phillips, dog-lover Sally Parry and fancy-dress enthusiast Stephen Drew

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Alexandra Austen hosts the second party of the week in east Kent, hoping to impress her guests with pan-European cuisine. However, the meal gets off to a shaky start when Sally Parry is forced to confront her fear of beans, while Stephen Drew struggles with a goat's cheese parcel. Alexandra's decision to serve veal also proves controversial, and it soon becomes clear two of the guests are not enjoying each other's company

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Sally Parry hosts the fourth dinner party in east Kent, hoping to impress her guests with a pink-themed night, including posh pink food and table decorations. However, Sally and Emma have a heated argument, Alex misbehaves and Wes falls asleep

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Flamboyant Stephen Drew hosts the final dinner party in east Kent, and has designed a menu that will allow him to spend time entertaining his guests. programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows two more self-build plots in Oxfordshire. Engineers Sean and Dianna are building an 'upside-down' house, with bedrooms downstairs so they can enjoy the views from their open-plan first floor. But an unexpected offer to work abroad upsets their carefully laid plans. Meanwhile, Garrie is building the largest house on the street, packed with expensive technology for wife Sue, who is disabled and has mental health issues

programme.desc: Examining what happens when members of the public act as judge and jury, and carry out their own retribution. In Wiltshire, PCs John Miller and Hannah Agate pursue and catch two men who have threatened to kill someone who they believe has attacked a person they know, and in Trowbridge, a supermarket security guard's attempts to stop a shoplifter stealing alcohol has tragic consequences

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landoll's Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of pioneering veterinary practice Fitzpatrick Referrals in Surrey, where orthopaedic-neuro veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick and his team help some of the nation's hardest-to-cure pets using cutting-edge procedures. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: James May straps into a highly tuned hatchback as he competes in a world rallycross race, with Top Gear USA host and professional driver Tanner Foust teaming up with him. Jeremy Clarkson puts the latest Jaguar F-type R and Eagle's modernised E-type the Low Drag GT though their paces, while Richard Hammond is in Spain to test the new version of the Mazda MX-5. Plus, X-Men: First Class star Nicholas Hoult takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Compilation of two features on classic cars and SUVs. The presenters immerse themselves in the world of classic cars, with Jeremy Clarkson in a Fiat 124 Spider, Richard Hammond in an MGB GT and James May in a Peugeot 304 Cabriolet. They also enter the realm of the sports utility vehicle as they find out what sort of SUV can be bought for just a few hundred pounds before putting them through a series of challenges

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his 900-mile road trip from Venice to Istanbul, sampling that array of gastronomic delights that lie on the route. In the penultimate episode Rick arrives in the Greek Peloponnese where he samples mouth-watering dishes such as rooster stew hilopites with mizithra cheese, and a home-made moussaka he claims is the best he have ever savoured. In his Symi island kitchen, Rick rolls up his sleeves to prepare galaktoboureko, a dessert of semolina custard in filo pastry, a favourite dish in Greece

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness travel to Ethiopia, where they test cars to see how they can endure in the searing heat. Back at the track, Chris puts the Ferrari 488 Pista and McLaren 600LT through their paces

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness present an electric cars special, each taking up the challenge of constructing a battery-powered sports car on a budget. Plus, Chris takes the Tesla Model 3 for a spin on the test track. Plus, Danny Boyle and Himesh Patel, director and star of fantasy comedy Yesterday, drop into the studio

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Strongman Eddie meets - and eats - gators roaming the Everglades, tests his grappling skills with WWE legends The Headbangers, and tries to devour a kitchen sink full of ice-cream

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Writer, actor, comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton accompanies Richard Ayoade on a voyage of discovery in Lisbon, the Portuguese capital city known for its decorative tiling and maritime history. Adam and Richard tackle it at break-neck speed in an electric rickshaw, visit a tinned-fish emporium, take the celebrated iron lift - the Elevador de Santa Justa - and listen to some fado, Lisbon's version of the blues. There's potent cherry liqueur for breakfast, a tram ride up a steep hillside and a trip to a doll hospital. The duo also pay a visit to Belem, home to Lisbon's famed custard tarts

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Anita Rani, Chris Ramsey, Janet Ellis and Jamie Theakston compete in Double Points Friday, and their scores are tallied from the week resulting in an overall champion being crowned

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a culinary journey by sea and land to explore the Far East's most diverse food cultures. He begins in Cambodia, where tourists are beginning to return after the fall of the Khmer Rouge regime. As well as discovering the joys of freshly caught swimmer crabs with green peppercorns, he learns how to cook the country's most famous dish - fish amok - and samples lok lak, made with marinated beef. He also visits the Angkor Wat temple and joins a rice barge to travel down the Mekong River

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedy actor Jack Dee embark on a clock-conscious exploration of the Italian city, enjoying two days rich in humour, history, culture and pizza. The pair start with a guided tour on vintage Vespas amid the city's chaotic traffic, attend a pizza-making class and then head to the volcanic ruins of Herculaneum. Day two sees them visit the Isle of Capri and play the lottery using la smorfia, a local guide to the meaning of dreams

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted
programme.desc: The life of Josef Mengele, the notorious demon doctor of Auschwitz, who conducted barbaric experiments on innocent victims - including children - in the concentration camp

programme.title: Medieval Dead
programme.desc: Artefacts related to medieval Italian warlords and their armies of mercenaries, who provided defence for the country's city states which had great wealth but small standing armies

programme.title: Hunting Down the Nazis
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary about Simon Wiesenthal, a survivor of the Holocaust who dedicated his life to tracking down Nazi war criminals who had escaped justice

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The story of Lieutenant General Leslie Morshead, who commanded the British and Australian troops who held off Rommel's Afrika Korps at the port of Tobruk in 1941

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A strange-looking town with a supernatural atmosphere, a collection of imposing buildings in southern Australia, and the remains of curious-looking basins emerging from the waves

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Germany, learning about an Edwardian fitness craze in Dresden before heading to Leipzig on a historic line built by British engineers in 1839. He discovers model-railway making on the grandest of scales in Hamburg and ends his journey in Kiel, where he reveals how British yachtsmen spied on the German navy in the early 20th century

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Kelvingrove Art Gallery and Museum. Finds brought in to be valued include some jewellery from the art deco era, a painting by artistic group the Glasgow Girls, and an ugly family heirloom that turns out to have been made by a very important historical figure - and is worth far more than its owners suspected

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: On the Welsh Highland Railway, a newly built Pullman carriage is on its way to Caernarfon Station and a Saddle Tank Loco is being completely restored on the East Lancashire Railway

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A look at the Qinghai-Tibet line, the highest railway in the world, providing an insight into the engineering challenges faced at high altitude and in bitterly cold temperatures

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Ruins from the time before the fall of the Berlin Wall, including a covert Communist base that hid Cold War submarines for Tito and the former HQ of the Soviet Army in East Germany

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The largest evacuation of the Second World War, which saw two million civilians and soldiers removed in an extraordinary German operation that lasted for four months

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Acclaimed chronicle of the Second World War, beginning with an account of Hitler's ascent to power at a time when the Germans were stricken by humiliating military defeat, runaway inflation and economic depression. The Nazi leader's promises of regained national pride and prosperity struck a chord with millions of ordinary citizens, and he was elected on a tidal wave of popular support. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores Scandinavia, braving one of the world's oldest rollercoasters in Copenhagen's Tivoli Gardens. He then crosses the Oresund Bridge linking Denmark to Sweden, retracing the journey of a train that carried a revolutionary Russian passenger on an epic voyage, before test-driving a vintage Volvo in Gothenburg. Crossing into Norway, Michael discovers how in 1913 the nation expressed its distinctively modern identity in plays, paintings and polar exploration

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow pays tribute to Her Majesty the Queen as she becomes Britain's longest-serving monarch

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewsons auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The history of the concentration camp, charting its origins as a place to hold political prisoners through its development into a mechanised factory for mass murder. The first episode features the accounts of Polish inmates held there prior to the Holocaust, Jewish survivors and a former SS officer, who discusses being placed in charge of a firing squad

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Ruins from the time before the fall of the Berlin Wall, including a covert Communist base that hid Cold War submarines for Tito and the former HQ of the Soviet Army in East Germany

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The largest evacuation of the Second World War, which saw two million civilians and soldiers removed in an extraordinary German operation that lasted for four months

programme.title: Medieval Dead
programme.desc: Artefacts related to medieval Italian warlords and their armies of mercenaries, who provided defence for the country's city states which had great wealth but small standing armies

programme.title: Medieval Dead
programme.desc: Tim Sutherland, Malin Holst and Simon Richardson investigate the discovery of barrels containing well-preserved swords on the site of the final battle of the Hundred Years War

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: A rare chance to see some memorable performances from the first 12 years of Top of the Pops, with the Rolling Stones, Tom Jones, Stevie Wonder, Queen, the Kinks and Status Quo

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the second leg of his journey from Preston to Kirkcaldy, returning to the historic Settle-Carlisle line he helped save from dereliction when he was Minister of State for Transport in the 1980s. Here, engineer Tony Feshini describes what life was like for the people who originally built Ribblehead Viaduct, before Michael visits Dent, Cumbria, home to the highest railway station in England

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey following George Bradshaw's footsteps, as the third leg of his trip from Preston to Kirkcaldy sees him embarking on a two-day tour of the Lake District. He begins in Windermere, where he travels by steamboat to the north of the lake, and continues to Claife viewing station, where he learns about the water pollution caused by increasing levels of tourism. He spends the night in Grasmere, and the following day reaches Kendal, where he buys local delicacies and meets a farmer who explains the impact of railways on farming practices

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches Carlisle, where he meets a descendant of the Border Reivers, a group of ancient lawless clansmen mentioned in Victorian train enthusiast George Bradshaw's book. From there, he travels to Gretna Green to learn about the village's famous marriage trade, explores an old Ministry of Defence munitions site, and visits the centre of Glasgow, which is enjoying a revival in popularity

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo leaves Glasgow and travels to Carluke in Lanarkshire's Clyde Valley, where he meets Tom Clelland, who is trying to revive his family's fruit-growing business. On his way to Edinburgh, he learns about the vast range of items left on trains, before spending the night in the city's famous Balmoral Hotel. His journey ends in Kirkcaldy, where he explores the paintings donated to the local gallery by his grandfather John Blyth

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels along Brunel's Great Western Railway, learning how mass tourism started in Swindon, before visiting Bath to discover the history of the famous spa baths. His last stop is Bristol, where he tries his hand at blowing blue glass

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the second leg of his journey from Swindon to Penzance. Starting in Yatton, he travels along a line that was once used to transport fresh strawberries across the country, but was closed by Dr Beeching in the 1960s. He also visits the Gough Cave in Cheddar Gorge to view the remains of the 9,000-year-old Cheddar Man - the oldest complete skeleton in Britain

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates the story of the island in the Indian Ocean, off the southeastern coast of Africa. It has an ecosystem that has stood in isolation for millions of years, and produced an array of wildlife that cannot be found anywhere else on the planet. He begins by observing lemurs in their habitat, male red giraffe-necked weevils fighting each other, the courting rituals of chameleons, and the behaviour of spiders and fossas

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: An observation of the wildlife that inhabits the narrow band of mountains and rainforest on the island's east coast, from ring-tailed lemurs living on an inhospitable peak, to forest-dwelling sifakas, small primates on the verge of extinction. The programme also focuses on the golden bamboo lemur, which is capable of consuming daily doses of cyanide, and looks at the fruit-rich treetops where red-ruffed lemurs defend their food and territory. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: David Attenborough observes the wildlife of the desert-like west and south of the island, an area where dry spells can last months and survival is a struggle. Verreaux's sifakas live among trees with potentially lethal spikes, while the baobab trees house mouse lemurs, primates that feed on the droppings of fluffy bugs. During the toughest time of year, gangs of ring-tailed lemurs try to raise their young, and as the rains arrive, the year-long life cycle of the Labord's chameleon begins

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates the story of the island in the Indian Ocean, off the southeastern coast of Africa. It has an ecosystem that has stood in isolation for millions of years, and produced an array of wildlife that cannot be found anywhere else on the planet. During the toughest time of year, gangs of ring-tailed lemurs try to raise their young, and as the rains arrive, the year-long life cycle of the Labord's chameleon begins

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A 23-year-old virgin from Kent picks a partner from six nude candidates - but this proves a nerve-racking experience, since he has never seen a naked woman in his life. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old beauty therapist from London is determined to have a baby before she turns 30, and hopes that one of the men lurking behind the screens will be the perfect father

programme.title: Dance Around the World
programme.desc: Three of Europe's most talented dancers take off on a global quest to find the beating heart and cultural roots of street dance. Throughout the series, the trio step out of their comfort zones, searching for dancing communities who have inspired the art form and discovering the roots of local dance culture. In the first episode, Suzette, Kym and Maren travel to Brazil, where they learn about the fast-paced fusion-dance passinho, before travelling to a rural settlement in the jungle outside Rio, where they are shown the art of capoeira, an ancient dance-fight born from the time of slavery

programme.title: Nazi Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: The team travels to North Africa, Corsica, Germany and South America to try to track down a huge cache of gold, currency and other valuables stolen from Tunisia's Jewish community

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring glamour model Annierose Crone hosts the first dinner party in Coventry, and prepares a menu featuring sausages in the starter, main course and dessert. Her guests are cleaner and wrestler Joanne Edwards, pub manager Tony Jackson, chocolatier Chris Tabor and salon owner Michelle Russell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Master chocolatier Chris Tabor hosts the second dinner party in Coventry, but his elaborate menu provokes some mixed reactions from the others, and he ends up falling out with pub landlord Tony Jackson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time pro-wrestler Joanne Edwards hosts the third party in Coventry. Her risky strategy is to prepare dishes she has never made before, and the lack of knowledge shows when she manages to injure herself twice while cooking the meal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Publican Tony Jackson hosts the fourth dinner party in Coventry. His guests have high expectations for his pub-themed event and while Michelle Russell thinks he may be the man to beat, Chris Tabor tries to spoil the evening by criticising every aspect of the meal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hair salon owner Michelle Russell hosts the final dinner party in Coventry, and the evening begins with champagne in the garden, but the proceedings take a turn for the worse when Tony Jackson decides to irritate the other guests and Joanne Edwards makes a shocking announcement. The winner of the £1,000 prize is also announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition comes from Blackpool and Preston, where the first host, 26-year-old student and barmaid Rachel, plans an American diner-themed menu. It's a menu that confuses her guests, but they all agrees that her hosting 'rocks'

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lady of leisure Jill is second to host in and around Blackpool and Preston, leaving no stone unturned in her effort to impress her guests with an Italian-themed menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cabin crew member Mark throws the third dinner party of the week, hoping to impress his guests with an evening of fine dining and first class hosting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Parole officer Bernard takes over hosting duties in Blackpool and Preston, hoping to woo his guests with a combination of northern soul and delicious grub. But a squabble over the starter results in a walk-out during the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final day in Blackpool and Preston and health assistant Lisa is banking on her 'no-faff' menu to bag the cash. However, it's not going to be easy, especially after the criticisms that have been free-flowing across the week. Home truths are revealed and temperatures soar, especially when Bernard gets the shock of his life as he's labelled boring, and he in turn tells Mark that he has been a drama queen. Lisa realises she needs to act quickly to change the atmosphere or risk losing out on the prize

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad, beginning with Cath and her daughter Kate looking for a tranquil holiday home along the Costa Almeria in southern Spain. Cath wants enough space for her family to be able to visit, but she also wants somewhere to escape the rat race and find inspiration for her writing. Danni Menzies has five great properties lined up for her £170,000 budget, but will any be the oasis of calm that she has her heart set on?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back to the couples taking a second shot at finding love again, including 47-year-old mother of two Emma's date with Peter, and self-confessed geek Sarah, who meet aspiring comic book writer Nick. Having been single for five years following the loss of his partner, Dale had high hopes for 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie aims to restore an old chateau carriage for her mother Isabelle's wedding, while it is moving-in day for Debbie and Nigel as they embark on a new life in France

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie builds a huge pergola on the terrace for her mother's wedding, while Sarah and George set up a photoshoot to drum up business and unearth a secret underground room

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Nigel tackles dated windows and Debbie creates her first mural as the duo set to work transforming a room in a rundown conservatory into a bright new garden room

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
