programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maggie and Alistair from Edinburgh dream of buying a holiday home on the southern coast of Gran Canaria. Jasmine Harman lines up five potential properties for their £350,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Pub landlady Alison seeks a home on the Costa Dorada in Spain. Famous for its golden beaches, the region has stunning river valleys and traditional hilltop villages, where Alison would love to buy a smallholding and keep chickens. With five options up his sleeve, Jonnie Irwin helps Alison and her friend Theresa, who's come along for support, find the perfect property for her £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lynne and her sister Debbie seek the perfect place on the beautiful Costa Teguise in Lanzarote. After Lynne's husband Frankie was diagnosed with a terminal illness, Lynne took early retirement to care for him. A holiday home in the sun has been a lifelong dream for this couple, and with Frankie's illness they don't want to wait any longer. With a budget of £150,000, Ben Hillman lines up five suitable properties for them to choose between

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?

programme.title: Surviving the Stone Age
programme.desc: Eight experts recreate life in Stone Age Britain, living as a tribe and using the resources and primitive tools of the time to hunt for food and build shelter

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: Year eight student Rani decides to play a Valentine's prank on his best friend Jack, but the strength of their friendship is put to the test after an incident in the playground. Meanwhile, the search to find the new head girl concludes and the winner is finally revealed to staff and students, and year 11 pupil Chelci has a falling out with best friend, Cheyenne

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by Kathy Burke, Jools Holland and Sophie Duker to look back at the highs and lows of dessert week and meet the unfortunate contestant who wobbled a little too much in the jelly art cake signature. There's also extra footage and photos of the curious so-called cakes that eager amateurs have been creating at home. With Tom Allen

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree's to-do list is as long as ever, and with no guests, weddings or events at the chateau this year, they use their engineering and design skills to tackle some major projects. First on the list is transforming one of the old outbuildings into a supersized workshop for chateau-sized jobs

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth tackle their first manual lock and some terrifyingly tight turns, but find themselves relaxing into life at 4mph, and marvel at how secret histories reveal themselves. They visit the Royal Gunpowder Mills, which built its own canal system to transport volatile ammunition - vital to Britain's success in both world wars

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home. In this first episode, the family start to adapt to their new life, and draw up plans for their ambitious modern stately home. Later, the whole family help out with lambing season

programme.desc: An old school friend visits Will and alarms Grace by asking him to donate his sperm so she can have a baby. Megyn Price guest stars

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's father tries to dissuade him from attending a company banquet - and it turns out he has been keeping his son's sexuality a secret from colleagues. Meanwhile, Karen believes she has tracked down Jack's real dad. Sydney Pollack guest stars

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Will visit a TV station to complain about the censoring of a tender scene between two gay men in one of its sitcoms. American comedy, starring Eric McCormack

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is taken aback to learn his former girlfriend Lisa is getting married and resolves to prove he is a better family man than her fiance by organising a Thanksgiving get-together. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Holland Taylor and Angus T Jones. Guest starring Denise Richards

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan is devastated to learn Judith has found a new boyfriend, and begins to wallow in gloom. To help boost his confidence, Charlie and Jake try to give him a makeover, but eventually admit defeat and bring in a gay man to choose the perfect outfit

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with the victims and villains of the housing rental market. Rachel intended to rent out her Snowdonia cottage for only three months. Four years later her tenant is still there and not paying any rent. Plus, the stories of Stevenage landlord Derek, whose tenant Kellie proved so troublesome that the police had to be called, and Claud from south London, who was left £30,000 in debt when a professional couple split up

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The buy-to-let documentary series looks back at cases from earlier episodes to find out if matters were resolved or have only got worse. They include a Yorkshire landlord who had to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents, and a bus driver who managed to win back possession of his home from a nightmare tenant. But just as the eviction was going through, she threatened to call the police

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve try to recover almost £2,000 owed by the owner of a bridal shop in London, while officers Gary and Cona in Kent chase over £4,000 of vet fees after two neighbouring dogs got into a fight. In south west London, agents try to collect almost £11,500 owed by a small business

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmor chase over £1,500 of unpaid parking fines in Manchester, while Matt and Garry have a job to reclaim £1,600 for a car hire company in the West Midlands. Finally, Stewart and Vic head to Lancashire to recover over £3,000 owed by a garage to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, agents Matt and Garry chase £1,700 owed by an accountant to a client, and officers Max and Paul try to recover almost £30,000 in north west London owed in rent arrears by a dentist after he was barred from working. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to south west London to chase almost £2,000 owed by a cafe owner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester to recover one of the largest debts they have ever chased - more than £400,000 - owed to a builder after he was failed to receive payment for his work on a house. Meanwhile, officers Gary and Cona are in Kent to chase over £11,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers track down the people responsible for stealing an expensive TV, and carry out an impairment test on a driver suspected of being under the influence of drugs. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers try to track down the criminals responsible for robbing a supermarket. Elsewhere, an interceptor is unconvinced when a disqualified driver pretends to be someone else, and a rude biker is taken to task

Sensing a need for human company, he pursues an unlikely romance with a waitress, who is the only person willing to put up with his rudeness. Romantic comedy drama, with Jack Nicholson, Helen Hunt, Cuba Gooding Jr and Greg Kinnear

programme.desc: Charlie injures his back and refuses to let his chiropractor brother help him. Seeking medical advice, he finds out his new doctor is a beautiful woman - but does not realise they have met before. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is eager to impress at a party thrown by gay advertising executive Eric, and asks Alan to pretend to be his partner. However, when the host's beautiful former wife makes an appearance, his cover is soon blown. Guest starring Lucy Lawless, with Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: The Harpers bump into Charlie's former girlfriend Sherri in a cafe and Alan takes an immediate shine to her, but can't get over her former relationship with his brother. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith bills Alan for a pair of expensive shoes she bought Jake, and Evelyn harasses Charlie for not keeping in contact. Peeved and generally aggrieved, the brothers take their frustrations out on each other. Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer star

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn discovers her second husband Harry has died and is pleased when Alan agrees to attend the funeral with her - until she finds out the pair had stayed in contact. Jake expresses his excitement at seeing a dead body, while Charlie looks forward to the prospect of meeting a recently bereaved widow

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn sets Alan up with her boyfriend's daughter, who is on a weekend pass from a rehab centre. However, their encounter soon spirals into chaos and finally results in his brand new sports car being involved in a televised high-speed chase. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn hears that Jake has been spending a lot of time with his other grandparents and demands he stay with her for a night. Alan is horrified at the prospect of his son getting the same treatment he did, so Charlie tries to take his mind off things - with help from a female volleyball team

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie sleeps with a young woman, oblivious to the fact she is married to an elderly man. Jake's teacher asks him to write a report of his weekend and he describes how the man showed up at the apartment looking for his wife, but the story veers some way from what really happened

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents chase more than £1,700 in unpaid parking fines in south-east London, but struggle to pinpoint the debtor. Meanwhile, officers in north Wales try to recover the £2,000 owed by a tradesman to a former employer, and in Kent agents chase £8,000 owed by a jewellery shop to two former employees

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After moving abroad for work, a landlord discovers that his tenants have left him over £20,000 behind with his mortgage, and the developers of an old swimming pool in Bristol discover that they are liable for the electricity that the building's squatters have been using

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Landlady Rose gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property, and Dave from Peterborough Council's housing team comes across some of the worst damp and mould he has ever seen. Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Gladiator (2000)
programme.desc: Roman general Maximus Decimus Meridius is a casualty of a power struggle between the corrupt Emperor Commodus and the senate. Ordered to be put to death along with his family, he escapes his would-be killers but is sold into slavery as a gladiator - and uses his fame in the arena to fight against the tyrant. Oscar-winning period epic, with Russell Crowe, Joaquin Phoenix, Derek Jacobi and Oliver Reed, in his last film role

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and team are called to a car park, where they examine the dead body of a courier who had been driving a bulletproof car with a secret compartment built into the floor. The victim was delivering a very important load - a Van Gogh painting bought at auction for $64million - which is now missing. Castle and Beckett work with the key witness to track down the painting and catch the killer

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: While Beckett is out of town, Castle becomes involved with Detective Slaughter in a case where a hi-tech chip has been stolen and one of Slaughter's informants is murdered

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a woman dies in a hospital emergency room, Briscoe and Logan investigate a doctor's unorthodox method of treating cancer, which McCoy intends to prove is negligent homicide. Sam Waterston joins the cast

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman lies in a coma after being found with a bullet in her head, leaving Briscoe and Logan to investigate whether her abusive husband is responsible for shooting her. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Japanese nightclub owner is killed while visiting New York, and a singer who once worked for the victim is arrested on suspicion of murder. While working on the case, Olivet is forced to confront memories of her sexual assault. Guest starring Laura Linney

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A taxi-driver is found dead in his car, and Logan follows a chain of evidence involving a loan shark, a forged cheque and a missing plumber that leads him to believe the victim's wife is the killer. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe investigate the murder of a psychiatrist, and their inquiries lead them to suspect the killer is either the victim's former husband, her obstructive father or a patient with multiple personality disorder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee's girlfriend Delilah makes a breakthrough in a case involving the alleged death of a US navy lieutentant. However, when her boss orders her to back away, she turns to the NCIS team for help. Meanwhile, McGee talks to DiNozzo about whether he should move forward with his relationship. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team must ascertain whether the murder of a Navy officer, whose body was found on a rural road, was the result of a bar fight or because he knew too much about an attack on a fellow female officer. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and McGee begin a juice detox to purge their bodies of impurities. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man convicted of rape is exonerated and released 16 years later. However, on the night of his release, the daughter of the woman he was convicted of raping is also raped and murdered - and he is SVU's prime suspect. Detective drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man uses a fake identity to lure a woman into bed, destroying her family, so Barba tries to get him convicted of rape - only to face a sceptical legal team. Raul Esparza stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An aspiring Olympic athlete claims she is a rape victim, but the publicity could threaten her Olympic future, and reveal some shocking details about her sordid personal life

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler are forced to explain their actions after the stabbing of a fireman leads to a massive brawl and an official inquiry. When questions arise concerning the victim's sexual preference, the detectives link the crime to a similar murder 12 years earlier - but a secret the wife has been keeping could hold the key to solving the case. Drama, starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the poisoning of a well-known historian, pursuing a line of inquiry that leads to the victim's cash-strapped brother. Unfortunately, he too is later found murdered, and the detectives turn their attention to the two men's wives - only to discover that both stood to gain from being widowed. Drama, guest starring Rip Torn

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher tries to unravel the mysterious theft of a painting, and also finds herself investigating the death of a friend's daughter. Starring Angela Lansbury, Norman Lloyd and Cliff Gorman

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica helps a friend whose diving expedition for buried treasure is hindered by a series of sinister incidents - including a suspicious death. Angela Lansbury and Tom Bosley star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher teams up with her old journalist friend Haskell Drake to unravel the mysterious and sudden death of a ruthless and corrupt newspaper mogul. Angela Lansbury, Harry Guardino and Eugene Roche star

programme.desc: Jessica puts her Hawaiian holiday on hold to clear private investigator Thomas Magnum of a double murder. Crossover episode with Magnum, PI guest starring Tom Selleck

programme.desc: Benson discovers that a young man facing rape charges is the son of a sergeant - her first police partner - who comes to her asking to cash in on an a favour that she owes him. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.desc: Rollins leads a sting operation to take down child pornographer Teddy Hawkins, also well-known as the owner of a chain of successful restaurants. However, when the team examines Teddy's cyber credentials, they discover he is connected to Deputy Commissioner Abraham, who vehemently denies any involvement in Hawkins' illicit distribution ring. With two high-profile arrests to their name, Rollins and her colleagues must work quickly to justify their actions before Abraham uses his power to make the charges 'go away'. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape charge Barba is bringing against a popular actor is placed in jeopardy, prompting Rollins to step in and take matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames travel to Vietnam to pick up a man who has recently confessed to murdering a 10-year-old actor in 1992. Guest starring Liza Minnelli

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: The Greenhouse Jungle (1972)
programme.desc: A penniless rare-plant collector, desperate for funds to support his expensive hobby, fakes his nephew's kidnapping to get his hands on a trust fund. However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland

programme.title: Columbo: Prescription Murder (1968)
programme.desc: A psychiatrist having an affair with a patient murders his wife with his lover's help. However, while he establishes the perfect alibi he soon finds himself pursued by Columbo, whose meandering investigative approach conceals an uncanny gift for detection. First episode of the detective series, starring Peter Falk and Gene Barry

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy businessman's children in his apartment. programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Bryan settles into his new home after a long journey from Mexico and one of his first tasks is to learn how to peel fruit. programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Flying Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the world of the pterosaur, a flying creature that occupied the skies 200 million years ago. Visiting sites around the world, from the Dorset coast to New Mexico, he explains how the reptiles evolved to defy the forces of gravity, and examines the features of their anatomy that can still be seen in present-day descendents. He also discovers why they became extinct after dominating the skies for millions of years

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The case of Ty Medland, who in February 2013 stabbed his wife Samantha to death in a public square in Brighton after posting indecent pictures of her on a social media website. The programme features candid interviews with Sam's mother Amelia Greening, as well as experts from the Sussex Major Crime Team and criminologist Elizabeth Yardley

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.desc: A storm stops the migration, but how do you lead a group of panicking geese through a hurricane?

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Homeowners work to increase the value of their properties, redesigning and refurbishing for maximum profits

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients suffering with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, to find out to what extent specially tailored food treatment programmes can help. Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Series recreating the court cases of three of the Second World War's most notorious Nazis, using eyewitness interviews and archive footage, as well as considering the interviews they underwent at the hands of lawyers and psychologists. The first episode focuses on the trial of Albert Speer, Hitler's chief architect and armaments minister, regarded by many as a 'good' Nazi. Nathaniel Parker stars

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Lady Persie's life has become increasingly complex, as she continues her illicit affair and pursues her right-wing political interests with little regard for the potential danger to those she loves. Meanwhile, Lady Agnes prepares for motherhood by having her picture taken by celebrated photographer Cecil Beaton - a visit that causes excitement for one particular member of the downstairs staff - and Sir Hallam finds himself dragged into the crisis surrounding the abdication of Edward VIII facing the British monarchy. Keeley Hawes, Ed Stoppard, Anne Reid and Claire Foy star in the period drama

programme.title: Forty Thousand Horsemen (1941)
programme.desc: Three Australian volunteers take part in the last cavalry charge in modern warfare while serving in Palestine. First World War drama, starring Grant Taylor and Betty Bryant

programme.title: Turn the Key Softly (1953)
programme.desc: Three women are released from prison and set about the difficult task of staying on the straight and narrow. Drama, starring Joan Collins, Yvonne Mitchell and Kathleen Harrison

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Brockley, Peckham and Rotherhithe. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Victoria Hollingsworth helps a sporty couple find a holiday home in Hawaii where they can indulge their passion for surfing. They visit lofts and flats set in tropical gardens and apartments with pools, hoping to find the perfect place on a budget of £200,000

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: A London Community in Lockdown
programme.desc: A heartfelt look at life during lockdown in the Listraban community in London, a record of a moment in time that will be in the history books for generations to come

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Series recreating the court cases of three of the Second World War's most notorious Nazis, using eyewitness interviews and archive footage, as well as considering the interviews they underwent at the hands of lawyers and psychologists. The first episode focuses on the trial of Albert Speer, Hitler's chief architect and armaments minister, regarded by many as a 'good' Nazi. Nathaniel Parker stars

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The story of Tin Pan Alley, where hit records were made to order and the first sightings of the popular music industry emerged. With contributions by Bing Crosby and Perry Como

programme.title: Angelica (2017)
programme.desc: A couple in Victorian London endure an unusual series of supernatural happenings following the birth of their child. Drama, starring Jena Malone, Janet McTeer and Ed Stoppard

programme.title: The Loft (2014)
programme.desc: Five successful married men rent an apartment where they can carry out their extra-marital affairs in secret. The arrangement works well until they find the corpse of a beautiful woman handcuffed to a bed - but which of them is the killer, and how will the grisly discovery affect their friendship? Thriller, with Karl Urban, James Marsden and Wentworth Miller

programme.title: Mob Handed (2016)
programme.desc: A journalist is outraged to receive no help from the police when her daughter is murdered, and resolves to take the law into her own hands. Her mission of vengeance leads her to join a gang of football hooligans pledged to bring vigilante justice to anyone who harms children. Thriller, starring Yvette Rowland and Robin Reid

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Tourists take a journey abroad, with unpopular travellers being sent home and replaced along the way

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Tourists take a journey abroad, with unpopular travellers being sent home and replaced along the way

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: To take his mind off his marriage break-up, Paul Dare plans to transform a Victorian house in Taunton which has no square rooms and is so structurally unsound that no mortgage company would lend him any money until the roof was fixed. Undeterred, he plans to turn his lounge into a garage, put a hot tub into his courtyard and squeeze a sauna into his tiny bathroom

programme.title: Black Island (1978)
programme.desc: Two boys become separated from the rest of their class while on a trip to a small island - and end up getting captured by a gang of armed criminals. Adventure, starring Michael Elphick, Martin Murphy and Michael Salmon

programme.title: The High Bright Sun (1965)
programme.desc: A military officer in 1950s Cyprus tries to negotiate a truce with a partisan leader during an uprising against the British occupation. Drama, with Dirk Bogarde and George Chakiris

programme.title: In the Doghouse (1961)
programme.desc: A newly qualified vet struggles to compete against an unscrupulous rival. Comedy, starring Leslie Phillips, Peggy Cummins, Hattie Jacques and James Booth

programme.title: Operation Cupid (1960)
programme.desc: A Cockney wide boy is running a struggling matrimonial agency. When a wealthy widow turns up looking for a husband, he sees the chance to become rich by posing as a South African millionaire and romancing her himself. Comedy, starring Charles Farrell, Avice Landone and Wallas Eaton

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple who have decided to sell their B&B farmhouse in Devon and make their home Down Under in Sydney discover their £400,000 will soon be swallowed up in the highly desirable city. However, their hopes are raised when they find a restored Edwardian country house and an architect-designed property overlooking the harbour on offer at £93,000 under budget

programme.title: A Place by the Sea

Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: City Swimmers
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, English men and women have braved arctic temperatures to swim in London's murky ponds. When threatened with closure by the Council, a campaign was launched to save them

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Peter Taylor investigates the rising number of lone wolf terror attacks targeting civilians, travelling to the US to talk to the FBI's deputy director and going on patrol with the NYPD. He asks what the UK Government can do to prevent radicalisation of young people and talks to Britain's most senior anti-terror police officer about what authorities here are doing to protect the public in the face of this growing threat

programme.title: Jasper Jones (2017)
programme.desc: When a town outcast suspected of murder shows 14-year-old Charlie Bucktin a dead body, the teenager attempts to find the killer. Mystery thriller, starring Levi Miller, Aaron McGrath and Angourie Rice

programme.title: 198 Grand (2019)
programme.desc: Three hapless criminals from South London get mixed up in an underworld double-cross, and find themselves in possession of a large sum of money that puts their lives in danger. Crime drama, starring Andy Frith and Dean Kilbey

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: A Chinese woman who sells pirated films and stolen phones on the streets of Brixton, south London, has to repay her debts to a local gang, but when an immigration raid leaves her with no home, money or friends, she finds refuge with a barber - and an unlikely bond soon forms. The second of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Katie Leung, Gershwyn Eustache Jr, Benedict Wong and Lennie James

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Recovering heroin addict Richard spends every day struggling to stay off drugs and only one thing spurs him on - the possibility of re-establishing contact with his teenage daughter. Faced with the prospect of never seeing her again, he's torn between returning to his old ways and salvaging the only relationship that matters to him. The third of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Lennie James, Mona Hammond, Darren Raymond and Brad Damon

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Having overcome a bout of health problems, septuagenarians Ena and John Ryman are keen to live a little, and that means selling their Guildford home and searching for a property on the Jurassic Coast. With a budget of up to £500,000, Seetha Hallett shows them round an unusual upside down thatch in Lyme Regis and a restored Georgian apartment in Sidmouth

programme.title: Go Kart Go (1964)
programme.desc: A group of children builds a go kart for a race, but a rival team plots to sabotage their efforts. Family drama, starring Dennis Waterman and Frazer Hines

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.title: Turn the Key Softly (1953)
programme.desc: Three women are released from prison and set about the difficult task of staying on the straight and narrow. Drama, starring Joan Collins, Yvonne Mitchell and Kathleen Harrison

programme.title: The October Man (1947)
programme.desc: A chemist with suicidal tendencies is falsely accused of murder - and his precarious mental state is further upset by taunts from the real killer. Psychological thriller, adapted from a novel by Eric Ambler, starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood and Joyce Carey

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple with a budget of £80,000 fly out to Puerto Vallarta on Mexico's Pacific coast in search of a holiday home they can rent out to fund a trip round the world. The glorious weather and beaches are matched by bargain-priced properties, including a seaview apartment, a family home with separate studio and a coastal penthouse boasting its own pool

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams recounts the extraordinary tale of a Chicago-style turf-war gunfight on the Hampshire-Wiltshire border during the Second World War and Ennis Smith reveals how she broke the rules to marry her soldier boyfriend Clarence

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The guitarist is joined by photographer and former Mary Quant model Pattie Boyd, who discusses her life in rock music and shares some of her favourite records

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A journey along the Thames from the Cotswold Hills to the North Sea, concentrating on the lives of the water voles, swans and eels that call it home, and highlighting the escalating battle to control the waterways despite technological advances in flood management. As London continues to sink faster than Venice, the untamed nature of the river is revealed

programme.title: Maxwell
programme.desc: One-off drama reconstructing the final stages in the life of Czech-born media mogul Robert Maxwell. Under intense pressure, with cracks showing in his business empire, his marriage in trouble, health concerns and a massive pension scheme fraud to hide, he escapes to the privacy of his yacht near the Canary Islands. David Suchet and Patricia Hodge star

programme.title: London Town (2016)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy living in 1970s London has his life changed forever when his is introduced to The Clash by his estranged mother. Drama, starring Tom Hughes, Jonathan Rhys Meyers and Dougray Scott

programme.title: Angelica (2017)
programme.desc: A couple in Victorian London endure an unusual series of supernatural happenings following the birth of their child. Drama, starring Jena Malone, Janet McTeer and Ed Stoppard

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: A Polish cleaner living in London discovers her gambling addict boyfriend has been killed in a vicious attack. She then unearths his secret relationship with another woman, and finds herself in grave danger. The last of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Katharina Schuttler, Jaime Winstone and Marcin Dorocinski

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman comes to the assistance of a Devon family who want to move to Tasmania so they can be closer to relatives who already call the island their home. They have a budget of £200,00, which they hope will enable them to purchase a property with plenty of land for the children to play on

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb helps Michael Grant search for a holiday home in Fuerteventura on the Canary Islands for £60,000. Properties on offer include a bargain flat, a traditional farmhouse and rural accommodation in the desert

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Carl from Doncaster, South Yorkshire, wants to win enough money to take his family to Jamaica, while campaign manager Claire hopes to take home enough cash for a deposit on a house. Phillip Schofield provides support as they tackle a range of challenges, from agility tests to skill trials, under pressure to hold their nerve as relatives and the studio audience watch their every move

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Boxer David Haye and I'm a Celebrity 2013 winner Kian Egan set out to complete a series of fiendishly difficult challenges, ranging from agility tests to skill trials, with the aim of winning a jackpot of £250,000 for charity. The more money they stand to win, the harder the task in front of them, but having both experienced the horrors of Bushtucker Trials, will they find it easier than most to hold their nerve? Phillip Schofield presents

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the opening day of the First Test at Trent Bridge, where the eagerly awaited series got under way. This is the 67th Test series to be played between the fierce rivals, dating back to 1882, and England start as favourites having won three of the last four series, and due to the difficulties the tourists have faced in replacing some of their most prominent players of recent years

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. A replay of the second day's play in the First Test at Trent Bridge, where the hosts were looking to continue their excellent recent record. England came into this having won their last four Tests on this ground dating back to 2008

programme.title: The Ashes - Verdict
programme.desc: A panel of experts offer their analysis of the second day of the First Test between England and Australia at Trent Bridge, as the sides continued the five-match series

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Highlights of the second day's play in the First Test at Trent Bridge, where the hosts are looking to continue their excellent recent record. England have won their last four Tests on this ground dating back to 2008, and they will also have fond memories of their last meeting here against Australia in 2005, which they won by three wickets

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from day three of the First Test at Trent Bridge, as the match passed the halfway point. The sides last met here in the Test arena in 2005, and only three players are still active for their countries from that match, with England's Kevin Pietersen and Ian Bell, and Australian captain Michael Clarke still involved. The tourists have been heavily reliant on Clarke in the recent years as they struggle to adapt with a relatively inexperienced outfit, while Pietersen and Bell have remained mainstays of the English middle order

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from day four of the First Test at Trent Bridge, where the second innings was likely to be taking shape ahead of the final day. When England last hosted Australia on this ground in this format in 2005 they claimed a crucial three-wicket victory that gave them a 2-1 lead in the series heading into the final Test at the Oval, a lead that they did not relinquish as they triumphed in an Ashes series for the first time since 1987

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Dallas Cowboys' 1993 Super Bowl triumph against Buffalo Bills at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. This match represented the first time in history that the same teams faced each other in the showpiece match in two consecutive years, while the Cowboys' 30-13 victory meant they tied the Pittsburgh Steelers and the San Francisco 49ers for most Super Bowl wins, as they claimed their fourth trophy
